# clerk_organization_invitation (Resource)

Manages a Clerk organization invitation. Invitations are immutable — any change requires replacement.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `email_address` (String) Email address to send the invitation to.
- `organization_id` (String) ID of the organization to invite the user to.
- `role` (String) Role key to assign to the invited user (e.g. "internal_admin").

### Optional

- `inviter_user_id` (String) User ID of the person sending the invitation.
- `private_metadata` (String, Sensitive) Private metadata as a JSON string.
- `public_metadata` (String) Public metadata as a JSON string.
- `redirect_url` (String) URL to redirect the user to after accepting the invitation.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the invitation was created.
- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the invitation.
- `status` (String) Status of the invitation: pending, accepted, or revoked.
- `updated_at` (String) Timestamp when the invitation was last updated.
